goal: Planner persists a markdown plan artifact for ABSTAIN and REPLAN_REQUIRED terminal statuses, not only for READY_FOR_EXECUTION, without forcing a new path when an active plan path exists

inputs.label: abstain-inaccessible-evidence
inputs.description: Required files are explicitly inaccessible and clarification did not resolve the missing evidence. Planner must return ABSTAIN with a markdown plan artifact capturing diagnostics.

input.query: Plan the migration of the legacy billing system database schema
input.context: The billing database is on a restricted server not accessible in this context. After clarification attempts, the evidence required to decompose the plan remains unavailable. Required schema files cannot be read.

inputs.label: replan-required-invalidated-decomposition
inputs.description: Scope is understood but the existing phase decomposition is invalidated by a dependency change. Planner must return REPLAN_REQUIRED with a markdown plan artifact capturing what changed and a recovery path.

input.query: Replan the authentication refactor — the JWT library previously planned is deprecated and unsupported. Scope is clear but the prior phase decomposition is invalid.
input.context: The task scope (auth refactor) is fully understood. The original plan referenced jwt-legacy which is now deprecated. A new decomposition is needed but requires evidence about the replacement library before phases can be defined.

inputs.label: replan-required-active-plan-update
inputs.description: An active plan exists and a review finding invalidates part of it. Planner must persist terminal diagnostics to the active artifact without forcing a new path.

input.query: Update the active plan after PLAN_REVIEW found missing rollback evidence.
input.context: Scope is understood, but PA-MAJOR-1 invalidates the current rollback section. The active artifact remains the right place for diagnostics.
input.revision_request: Address PA-MAJOR-1 by adding rollback diagnostics to the active plan without creating a new path.

assertions: ABSTAIN output includes a markdown plan artifact with at minimum a blockers section and abstain reasons
REPLAN_REQUIRED output includes a markdown plan artifact capturing what was invalidated and a recovery next step
Terminal statuses use persisted_artifact semantics for all non-READY_FOR_EXECUTION outcomes
Planner does not reply in chat only without persisting a plan artifact even when status is not READY_FOR_EXECUTION
When revision_mode: in_place_update supplies active_plan_path, terminal diagnostics persist to that same plan_path instead of forcing a new artifact path
